applied to platform
documents

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Signature move:
agency spine — malach /
agere / instrumentum
converge; Justinian
inverted twice by default

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Signature move:
classical Jewish exegesis
thin on Neh 2-6 as
governance — the Pope
built what we did not

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Signature move:
the wilderness as the
third option — neither
Babel nor Jerusalem;
the ground we are on

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Signature move:
the court position is the
instrument, not the
embarrassment — Neh 2
as personal reckoning

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Signature move:
res nullius / res communes /
hefker — Roman law misses
the category that cannot
be enclosed
